name: pasillo-arc
description: AI travel agent that books real Duffel flights and settles on Arc L2 in USDC. Exposes an MCP server so any AI can plug it in as a travel rail.

skills.name: Travel booking
skills.description: Search and book flights + hotels via Duffel. Issue real PNR, hold-then-pay.

skills.name: Arc L2 settlement
skills.description: USDC/EURC settlement on Arc Testnet with gasless user ops via passkey MSCA.

skills.name: Cross-chain liquidity
skills.description: Unified treasury USDC across Ethereum Sepolia, Base Sepolia, Arc Testnet, Avalanche Fuji, Optimism Sepolia, Arbitrum Sepolia, Polygon Amoy via Circle Gateway.
